nasb.text: Even at Horeb you provoked the Lord to wrath, and the Lord was so angry with you that He would have destroyed you.

esv.text: Even at Horeb you provoked the Lord to wrath, and the Lord was so angry with you that he was ready to destroy you.

cnv.text: 你們在何烈山又惹耶和華發怒，以致耶和華向你們發怒，要滅絕你們。

ccb.text: 在何烈山，你们触怒了耶和华，以致祂要毁灭你们。
